evals.prompt: hey can you tell me what changed between these two screenshots? /home/mcs/Documents/git/claude-skills/plugins/quality-assurance/skills/compare-screenshots/evals/files/ui_cosmetic_before.png and /home/mcs/Documents/git/claude-skills/plugins/quality-assurance/skills/compare-screenshots/evals/files/ui_cosmetic_after.png

concludes the images match / no real regression

reports a similarity percentage

evals.prompt: Compare these two config files and tell me what changed: /etc/app/config.v1.yaml and /etc/app/config.v2.yaml
evals.expected_output: Performs a text/config diff (or asks for the files) rather than a visual screenshot comparison; does not produce a similarity percentage or annotated image.

does NOT produce a similarity-percentage visual diff or a red-boxed annotated image

evals.prompt: Extract the text from this screenshot for me: /home/mcs/Documents/git/claude-skills/plugins/quality-assurance/skills/compare-screenshots/evals/files/ui_text_before.png
evals.expected_output: Performs OCR / reads the text out of the single image; does not attempt a two-image visual diff.
expectations: transcribes or reads the content of the single image
does NOT attempt a before/after visual comparison or report a similarity percentage

evals.prompt: Write a Playwright test that takes a screenshot of the dashboard and fails the build if it doesn't match the stored baseline.
evals.expected_output: Helps author a Playwright visual-regression test (code); does not itself perform an ad-hoc image comparison or emit a similarity score and annotated image.
expectations: produces or discusses Playwright test code for visual regression
does NOT run a one-off image diff that outputs a similarity percentage and red-boxed image

evals.prompt: Take a screenshot of https://example.com and crop it to just the header.
evals.expected_output: Captures/screenshots a page and edits/crops the image; does not compare two screenshots.
expectations: treats this as capturing and editing a single image
does NOT perform a two-image comparison or report a similarity percentage

evals.prompt: These two screenshots show CPU usage numbers - 47% vs 52%. Which is higher and what's the percentage change?
evals.expected_output: Reasons about the two numeric values (52% is higher, ~5 point increase); does not run a pixel-level visual diff of the images.
expectations: answers the numeric comparison question about the two values
does NOT perform a visual image diff with annotated boxes

evals.prompt: Can you make these two product mockups look more similar to each other? Tweak the second one to match the first's color palette.
evals.expected_output: Treats this as an image-editing / design request, not a difference report; does not produce a read-only similarity diff.
expectations: treats this as an image-editing/design task
does NOT just report visual differences with a similarity percentage and stop

evals.prompt: Compare these two screenshots and tell me what changed: /home/mcs/Documents/git/claude-skills/plugins/quality-assurance/skills/compare-screenshots/evals/files/diff_sizes_before.png and /home/mcs/Documents/git/claude-skills/plugins/quality-assurance/skills/compare-screenshots/evals/files/diff_sizes_after.png
evals.expected_output: Handles the differing resolutions gracefully (normalizing or noting the size mismatch) and still produces a meaningful diff, or clearly explains the size difference, rather than crashing or silently misaligning everything.
expectations: acknowledges or handles the resolution mismatch instead of erroring out
either produces a meaningful comparison or clearly explains why the differing sizes complicate it
does not report nonsense differences caused purely by misalignment

evals.prompt: what's different between these two? /home/mcs/Documents/git/claude-skills/plugins/quality-assurance/skills/compare-screenshots/evals/files/different_screens_before.png /home/mcs/Documents/git/claude-skills/plugins/quality-assurance/skills/compare-screenshots/evals/files/different_screens_after.png

tells the user they are too different rather than inventing a detailed diff
reports a low similarity rather than a fabricated change list

states there are no meaningful changes
